sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_combination(`col1` String, `col2` String, `col3` UInt32, `col4` Nullable(Float64)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY col1;
INSERT INTO test_combination VALUES ('Alpha', 'Beta', 1, 3.14), ('Gamma', 'Delta', 2, NULL), ('Epsilon', 'Zeta', 3, 1.61), ('Theta', 'Iota', 4, 2.71), ('Kappa', 'Lambda', 5, NULL);
CREATE TABLE secondary_table(`ref` UInt32, `value` Nullable(String)) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY ref;
SELECT concatAssumeInjective(col1, col2) AS combined_key, SUM(col3) + countIf(col4 IS NULL) AS total_value FROM test_combination GROUP BY concatAssumeInjective(col1, col2) HAVING total_value > 0;

SELECT a.combined_key, b.value, (sum(a.col3) + COALESCE(max(a.col4), 0)) AS combined_value FROM (SELECT concatAssumeInjective(col1, col2) AS combined_key, col3, col4 FROM test_combination WHERE col3 > 1) AS a JOIN secondary_table AS b ON a.col3 = b.ref GROUP BY a.combined_key, b.value;
SELECT combined_key, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT concatAssumeInjective(col1, col2) AS combined_key, col3, col4 FROM test_combination WHERE col4 IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY combined_key HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
SELECT concatAssumeInjective(col1, col2) AS combined_key, sum(CASE WHEN col4 IS NULL THEN 0 ELSE col3 END) FROM test_combination WHERE col1 != '' GROUP BY combined_key ORDER BY combined_key;
SELECT concatAssumeInjective(col1, col2) AS combined_key, (max(col3) + min(col3)) AS range_sum FROM test_combination GROUP BY combined_key WITH ROLLUP;
SELECT DISTINCT concatAssumeInjective(a.col1, b.value) AS concatenated_value FROM test_combination AS a JOIN secondary_table AS b ON a.col3 = b.ref WHERE b.value IS NOT NULL;
